div.div: 3 student birthdays today — Arjun, Priya, Meenal
Fee deadline in 2 days — 47 students pending

div.p: Register a new student with class and section assignment

t.div: No sections yet — add one below.

div.div: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria to find students.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);

button.style: padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-color: rgba(0, 196, 140, 0.3); background: rgba(0, 196, 140, 0.1); color: var(--emd-emerald);

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);

div.t: No fee assignments yet. Confirm a Fee Structure to auto-assign fees.
No fees match the selected filter.

div.div: Create one and confirm it to auto-assign fees to all students in the class.

div.t:
No fee assignments with pending balance exist yet.
Go to Fee Structures → Create a structure → Confirm & Assign to auto-generate student fee records.

div.div: This is a computer-generated receipt and does not require a signature.
After saving, click Confirm & Assign on the structure card. The system will automatically traverse Class → Sections → Students and assign the fee to every active student.

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-top: 12px;
padding: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01); cursor: pointer;
padding: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01); cursor: pointer;
padding: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01); cursor: pointer;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);
margin-top: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; text-align: left; font-size: 13px;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--emd-text-label); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px;

input.style: width: 100%; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--emd-border); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); color: white; outline: none;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--emd-text-label); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px;
div.span: Send daily attendance digests to admin
